    1. OnTheFlyAgiTool()

Class OnTheFlyAgiTool

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolContext
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.OnTheFlyAgiTool
All Implemented Interfaces:
Callable<Object>
public abstract class OnTheFlyAgiTool extends ToolContext implements Callable<Object>
The base class for all Java code generated by the AI model. It extends ToolContext to provide access to the agi environment and implements Callable for execution.
Author:
anahata
